name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: This is a healthy and well-maintained local Deshi cow from Bogura. The cow has been raised in a natural environment with organic feeding including grass, straw, and homemade feed. It is disease-free, active, and has strong body structure suitable for both meat and breeding purposes. Regularly vaccinated and dewormed. Ideal for Qurbani or farm use.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Authentic Black Bengal goat from Kushtia, known for its high-quality meat and fast growth. The goat is fully healthy, active, and raised under proper farm conditions. It has been fed natural grass and grains. This breed is highly popular in Bangladesh due to its excellent meat taste and low fat content. Perfect for Qurbani or small farm investment.

name: Red Chittagong Cow
description: Original Red Chittagong Cow (RCC), a premium indigenous breed of Bangladesh. This cow is well-known for its strong immunity, adaptability, and quality meat production. Raised with proper care, natural feeding, and regular health checkups. The cow is active, disease-free, and suitable for both dairy and beef purposes.

name: Jamunapuri Goat
description: Large-sized Jamunapuri goat from Rajshahi, famous for its long ears and tall body structure. This goat has been raised in a hygienic farm environment with balanced nutrition. It is strong, healthy, and suitable for breeding as well as meat production. A premium choice for those looking for bigger goats for Qurbani.

name: Sahiwal Bull
description: Strong and muscular Sahiwal bull located in Dhaka. This breed is internationally recognized for its excellent growth rate and meat quality. The bull is raised with high-quality feed, properly vaccinated, and maintained under professional farm supervision. Ideal for breeding and large-scale farming.

name: Barbari Goat
description: Healthy Barbari goat from Pabna, known for its compact size and high fertility. This goat is active, disease-free, and raised in a clean and controlled environment. It is suitable for both meat and breeding purposes. Proper feeding and vaccination ensure its excellent condition.

name: Brahman Cross Cow
description: Well-built Brahman Cross cow from Sirajganj with strong body structure and high meat yield potential. This cow has been raised under proper farm management with balanced feed and regular health monitoring. It is active, healthy, and suitable for both beef production and breeding.

name: Australian Friesian Cow
description: Premium Australian Friesian cow from Sylhet, known for its high milk production and distinctive black-and-white pattern. This cow is well-fed with nutritious feed and maintained in a hygienic farm environment. Regular health checkups and vaccinations ensure top condition. Ideal for dairy farming.

name: Beetal Goat
description: Tall and heavy Beetal goat from Jessore, known for its large body size and fast growth rate. The goat is healthy, active, and raised with proper nutrition and care. Suitable for both meat production and breeding. A great choice for those looking for premium goats.

name: Gir Cow
description: Rare and premium Gir cow from Mymensingh, highly valued for its excellent milk production and strong genetics. This cow is raised under expert supervision with high-quality feed and regular medical care. It is healthy, calm in nature, and ideal for dairy farming and breeding purposes.
